blocks.text: David Carter, with Daniel Leach and Brenda Rodriguez copied:

Thank you for the files that came through last week. We now have the first purchasing and accounts-payable extracts for {{fact:f:E-2014-001.client}}, and Daniel Leach has them loaded and is reconciling them against the general ledger. Nothing in the data so far changes the plan we walked through at kickoff, and the spend picture is coming together on schedule.

Two things would help us hold that schedule. First, the accounts-payable extract is missing the plant-level detail for the two southern sites, so we cannot yet see spend by location there; if your finance group can send that cut, Daniel Leach can fold it straight in. Second, the purchasing-card records would let us see the smaller, off-contract buying that the main system does not capture, and that is usually where a fair share of the leakage sits.

On interviews, Brenda Rodriguez would like time with the category owners and two or three plant purchasing leads over the next few weeks. If your assistant can hold the slots, we will send a short list of names and topics ahead of each session so nobody walks in cold. Nothing else is needed from your team at Pacheco-Casey today.
